content:
Reference reply from 5: <think>The lake data showed level at 657 ft MSL with "normal — 3.0 ft below full pool". Full pool is typically around 660 ft. So the lake is not full yet, it's 3 feet below full pool.
Let me just answer directly.</think>
Not quite — 3 feet below full pool. Sitting at 657 ft, full is 660 ft. Getting closer but we're still in the normal range. Spring rains will fill it eventually.
